title: Livlong 365 and Yugen Infra join hands to redefine wellness-centric residential living in India
summary: Livlong 365, India’s leading healthcare and wellness platform, has entered into a strategic partnership with Yugen Infra to create one of the country’s most comprehensive healthcare-integrated living ecosystems. Through this […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
The initiative aims to establish a model to enhance wellness-driven living by bringing healthcare as not merely an accessible service but an integral component of residential infrastructure.

Livlong 365, India’s leading healthcare and wellness platform, has entered into a strategic partnership with Yugen Infra to create one of the country’s most comprehensive healthcare-integrated living ecosystems. 

Through this partnership, Livlong 365 will help design and enable a holistic healthcare framework within Yugen Golf City, incorporating preventive health programs, wellness initiatives, rehabilitation support, assisted living services, emergency medical access, and healthcare infrastructure in collaboration with leading healthcare providers, including the Manipal Hospitals Group. 

The initiative aims to establish a model to enhance wellness-driven living by bringing healthcare as not merely an accessible service but an integral component of residential infrastructure.

The Livlong 365 CEO and Founder, Gaurav Dubey said, “The future of healthcare lies in making wellness and medical support an integral part of daily living rather than a reactive service. Our partnership with Yugen Infra represents a progressive model where preventive healthcare, assisted living, rehabilitation, and emergency care are seamlessly embedded into a thoughtfully designed lifestyle ecosystem. Together, we are committed to building a community that prioritises longevity, dignity, accessibility, and holistic well-being.”

As awareness around preventive healthcare, longevity, and quality of life continues to rise, the demand for wellness-centric communities is growing across age groups. 

On this occasion, Sheeshram Yadav, Managing Director of Yugen Infra commented, “This partnership represents a major milestone for the industry. It will play an important role in establishing a future in which health and wellness become part of everyday life. Our vision as Yugen Golf City is not only to construct upscale residences but rather to build a comprehensive ecosystem focused on supporting health, longevity, community and quality of life. Our partnership with Livlong 365 and leading health systems such as Manipal Hospitals Group, creates the foundation for one of the most forward-looking integrated township developments in India that will prioritise both luxury and human wellness.” 

The MoU marks the beginning of a long-term collaboration focused on creating a world-class destination where residents can enjoy a seamless blend of premium living, preventive healthcare, wellness services, and long-term care support—all within a single ecosystem.
